title: Anlidan Vanilla Structures
description: This datapack adds many structures in a vanilla style.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f57ffbd1ad9cd3b619054e89a3ca7962c1ae19e_0.webp)

# **Anlidan Vanilla Structures**

This datapack adds a variety of new structures that seamlessly blend into the vanilla style of Minecraft. Each structure is designed with the atmosphere and balance of the original game in mind, making them a natural addition to the world.

During development, I focused on building materials, avoiding the use of rare or collectible blocks (such as mob heads or excessive use of spawners). This ensures that the structures integrate smoothly into the gameplay rather than feeling out of place.

All chests found within these new structures use loot tables from vanilla Minecraft. This means that in-game rewards are fairly distributed and remain consistent with the original mechanics.

The added structures can generate in various biomes, making exploration even more exciting. This datapack is perfect for players who want to diversify their Minecraft world while maintaining its balance.
